pre_mission.speaker: Draven
pre_mission.line: About time. I was starting to think the capital had run out of competent help.

pre_mission.speaker: Draven
pre_mission.line: Still impossible to bury, I see.

pre_mission.speaker: Lyria
pre_mission.line: Reunions should usually hurt less than this.

post_mission.speaker: Draven
post_mission.line: Enough. We held for civilians. No order told us to. We did it because someone had to be better than the order.

post_mission.speaker: Sera
post_mission.line: Then your dead were not wasted.
